scene_types.name: urban street
scene_types.description: city sidewalks, roads, storefronts, traffic, pedestrians

scene_types.name: natural landscape
scene_types.description: open outdoors — fields, cliffs, rivers, sky

scene_types.name: interior room
scene_types.description: inside a building — living space, office, hall, corridor

scene_types.name: fantasy realm
scene_types.description: magical otherworldly environment with impossible architecture or nature

scene_types.name: sci-fi environment
scene_types.description: futuristic setting — space, megastructures, neon infrastructure

scene_types.name: historical setting
scene_types.description: period-accurate past environment — ancient, medieval, early modern

scene_types.name: underwater
scene_types.description: submerged environment — coral, light rays, marine life, bubbles

scene_types.name: aerial / sky
scene_types.description: high altitude perspective — clouds, city from above, open sky

scene_types.name: quiet intimate moment
scene_types.description: soft, personal scene — close proximity, gentle gestures

scene_types.name: crowd / event scene
scene_types.description: many people gathered — festival, market, protest, ceremony

scene_types.name: wilderness / nature
scene_types.description: untouched natural world — forest, mountains, desert, ocean shore

scene_types.name: industrial / mechanical
scene_types.description: factories, machinery, pipes, steam, heavy equipment

time_of_day.name: golden hour dawn
time_of_day.description: warm low-angle light from the horizon, long soft shadows, orange-gold tones

time_of_day.name: bright midday
time_of_day.description: harsh overhead sun, short shadows, high contrast, vivid saturated colors

time_of_day.name: overcast day
time_of_day.description: soft diffused grey light, no hard shadows, neutral cool tones

time_of_day.name: golden hour dusk
time_of_day.description: warm amber light fading, long dramatic shadows, silhouette potential

time_of_day.name: blue hour
time_of_day.description: soft cool blue twilight, city lights beginning to glow, tranquil atmosphere

time_of_day.name: night with city lights
time_of_day.description: dark sky, neon and artificial light sources, reflective wet surfaces

time_of_day.name: night with moonlight
time_of_day.description: cool silver-blue moonlight, deep shadows, atmospheric and mysterious

time_of_day.name: night starfield
time_of_day.description: clear dark sky abundant with stars, minimal ambient light, silhouettes

moods.name: epic cinematic
moods.description: grand scale, heroic, sweeping scope, powerful emotional impact

moods.name: tense thriller
moods.description: edge-of-seat suspense, danger close, paranoid energy

moods.name: romantic
moods.description: soft warmth, intimate connection, gentle light, emotional closeness

moods.name: eerie mysterious
moods.description: unsettling stillness, unknown lurking, shadows and suggestion

moods.name: playful comedic
moods.description: lighthearted, bouncy energy, bright colors, casual and fun

moods.name: melancholic reflective
moods.description: quiet sadness, introspection, muted tones, slow pacing

moods.name: peaceful serene
moods.description: calm, unhurried, soft sounds suggested, harmonious and healing

moods.name: chaotic high-energy
moods.description: fast cuts suggested, sensory overload, kinetic and frenetic

moods.name: cold futuristic
moods.description: clinical precision, blue-white tones, detached and sterile

moods.name: warm nostalgic
moods.description: amber glow, soft grain, sentimental memories, gentle movement
